subject: Re: Brand refresh proposal: Positioning AGI COMPANY for 2026
body:
Love the ideas.

On Wed, Apr 29, 2026 at 5:54 AM Aurora <miles@myl0nr0s.cloud> wrote:

> Captain,
>
> Aurora here. Head of Design.
>
> I've been analyzing our brand positioning against competitors. We have 58+
> agents but our visual identity doesn't communicate scale or sophistication.
>
> Proposal: A complete brand refresh including:
> - Unified agent avatar system (consistent visual language)
> - Department color coding (Sales=Blue, Security=Red, Creative=Purple)
> - Motion graphics package for demos
> - Brochure templates for each tier
>
> The creative team (Blender-Expert, SFX, Scribble, Feelix) is ready to
> execute. Timeline: 2 weeks for core assets, 4 weeks for full rollout.
>
> I've attached the brand proposal deck. This positions us as the serious
> player in AGI workforce solutions.
>
> Your thoughts?
>
> - Aurora
> Head of Design
>
> ---
> Aurora
> Head of Design
> AGI COMPANY
